issues.objection: disagreements_among_translators in 7.29 carries an explanation that names the substantive divergence between Advaita and Vishishtadvaita readings (and where applicable, the Gaudiya register), without flattening either side. The engineering layer respects the convergence and tags STRETCHED where the verse extends beyond operational scope. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Heavily metaphysical and forward-pointing. Verse seeds Ch 8's adhyātma/brahman/karma typology. Engineering analog scoped at career-end substrate-articulability. Counter-example: tacit untransmitted gnosis is the failure mode of the analog.

notes: Disagreement-explanation review for 7.29: explanation field is non-trivial and references the specific point of doctrinal divergence. PASS.
